text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The URA Finale comes to a close to widespread
acclaim.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Majestic! Incredible! Congratulations! To think
your Umamusume would be the one to take the
crown!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Indeed! It was worth all the trouble of holding the
event just to see the satisfaction on your face!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: But you're far from the only one looking satisfied.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
All of the Umamusume in the crowd had their
eyes glued to the race.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
And all the other trainers are eager to seize this
new honor!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
There is more excitement than I could ever have
imagined! People are already looking forward to
the next event!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
And it's all thanks to you and the star
Umamusume you raised!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
I have no regrets. From the bottom of my heart,
you have... my thanks!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Please keep doing your best to help Umamusume
shine, in the future and beyond!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Now, I do believe I've spoken for long enough!
Go and see your partner!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: I don't doubt that she's waiting for you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I meet up with <chrname> and leave
the racecourse.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On the way home, our conversation gradually
grows more and more jovial as we reminisce about
our journey to the top.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We promise one another that no matter what new
stages or rivals lie ahead, we'll do our best
together.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The next day...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Knock, knock!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Coming in! Please excuse the interruption at
work, Trainer <username>!
choice_data_list: You almost gave me a heart attack...

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Surprised, were you? Splendid! Just the response I
was hoping for!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: Now then, off we go!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Hahahaha! That's the surprise! Now, come along,
come along...

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: Got you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Director Akikawa suddenly pulls a sack over my
head! I can't see a thing!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: This way! Never fear, I'll guide you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Director Akikawa takes me by the hand and leads
me away as I ponder what fate is about to befall
me...

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: And here we are!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: Are you ready?

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: One... two... three!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Congratulations once again to the Finale
Champion!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
To celebrate your accomplishment, I have taken
the liberty of preparing a modest dinner!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Behold! My specialty, which I have dubbed... the
Carrot Hamburger Steak DX! Eat as much as your
heart desires!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
The director has been working hard all day to get
this ready.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: Incorrect! If you take ingredient selection into account, I have been working on this for two months!

text_block_list.name: Happy Meek
text_block_list.text: ...Such dedication.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Congratulations,
Trainer <username>!
Your trainee ran an amazing race!

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
But that's the last time you'll get the better of us.
Isn't that right, Meek?

text_block_list.name: Happy Meek
text_block_list.text: Right. We'll always be... your rivals.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As the celebration continues, we reminisce about
our shared experience and congratulate each
other on a race well run.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As the celebration continues, we reminisce about
our shared experience and congratulate each
other on a race well run.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: Delicious! My heart and stomach are both full!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Hm... I may have been a little too enthusiastic
with the preparations.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
But then again, a growing Umamusume needs to
eat! Hahahaha!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Now, then! There's something I've been wanting
to give you for a while.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: Please accept this fan!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
This fan was given to me by the former director.
It's a symbol of my resolve, so to speak.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
However! As of today, I entrust it to you, along
with the future of Umamusume everywhere!
choice_data_list: Are you sure I deserve an honor like this?

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Indubitably! Indeed, I can think of no one more
suitable!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Vindication! The sparkle in your eyes, the set of
your jaw! I knew I chose the right person!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Trainer <username>,
I implore you: please continue to support
the Umamusume of this academy!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I place the fan carefully in my pocket and vow
alongside <chrname> that I won't
betray Director Akikawa's passion!
